name: DFIRPlatform_IOCEnrichment
author: DFIR Lab
description: Enrich indicators of compromise (IPs, domains, hashes, URLs) using the DFIR Platform API. Aggregates intelligence from 14+ sources including VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, Shodan, and more.

configurationItems.name: api_key
configurationItems.description: API key for the DFIR Platform. Obtain one at https://platform.dfir-lab.ch

configurationItems.name: base_url
configurationItems.description: Base URL for the DFIR Platform API
